{ "name": "balanced-match", "description": "Match balanced character pairs, like \"{\" and \"}\"", "version": "1.0.2", "repository": { "type": "git", "url": "git://github.com/juliangruber/balanced-match.git" }, "homepage": "https://github.com/juliangruber/balanced-match", "main": "index.js", "scripts": { "test": "tape test/test.js", "bench": "matcha test/bench.js" }, "devDependencies": { "matcha": "^0.7.0", "tape": "^4.6.0" }, "keywords": [ "match", "regexp", "test", "balanced", "parse" ], "author": { "name": "Julian Gruber", "email": "mail@juliangruber.com", "url": "http://juliangruber.com" }, "license": "MIT", "testling": { "files": "test/*.js", "browsers": [ "ie/8..latest", "firefox/20..latest", "firefox/nightly", "chrome/25..latest", "chrome/canary", "opera/12..latest", "opera/next", "safari/5.1..latest", "ipad/6.0..latest", "iphone/6.0..latest", "android-browser/4.2..latest" ] } }
